highlights: Teaching support role (2025): led lab sections/office hours and helped grade assignments.

high_school.focus_note: Master resume includes all activities; junior/senior years include extra detail.

activities.title: Robotics Club (Programming Lead)
bullets: Led a team of 6 students to build autonomous navigation routines in Java for competitions.
Implemented PID tuning for line-follow and turn control; reduced navigation error by ~30% during testing.
Maintained a shared codebase and wrote setup notes to onboard new members more quickly.

activities.title: Math Team
bullets: Organized weekly practice problem sets for 15+ members focused on algebra, combinatorics, and probability.
Participated in regional contests; tracked progress and shared study resources.

activities.title: Peer Tutor (STEM)
bullets: Tutored peers in precalculus and introductory programming; supported exam prep and projects.
Created short review sheets and example problems for weekly sessions.
Built a claims-based patient risk model using logistic regression and gradient boosting; improved AUC from 0.71 to 0.79 on validation data.
Designed a feature pipeline in SQL + Python (120+ features) with automated data quality checks and reproducible notebooks.
Created a monitoring dashboard for cohort trends; reduced weekly reporting time from ~2 hours to 20 minutes.
Supported course labs for 60+ students; explained regression, diagnostics, and model selection concepts.
Authored grading rubrics and reference solutions; improved clarity and reduced regrade requests.
Built an internal ticket triage tool integrating email + database records; reduced manual tagging workload by ~25%.
Wrote SQL queries and exports for monthly service metrics used in reporting.

research.focus_area: Temporal risk modeling and visualization for healthcare collaboration networks
bullets: Developed temporal features for network snapshots and evaluated predictive models across care phases.
Built interactive visualization prototypes to explore risk trajectories and care team dynamics.
Modeled daily and hourly bike rentals with multiple regression; evaluated interactions (hour × workingday) and model selection via AIC/CV RMSE.
Compared OLS, penalized regression (ridge/lasso), and nonlinear temperature effects; reported uncertainty using bootstrap confidence intervals.
Built a prototype that ranks resume bullets against a target role using TF-IDF + keyword weighting.
Implemented grouping by category (skills, projects, experience) and output constraints (e.g., one-page limit).
Ingested transaction data and built automated category rules; created interactive spending trend dashboards.
Added anomaly flags for unusual charges using simple statistical thresholds.

leadership.title: Women in Data Science Chapter Officer
bullets: Organized speaker events and resume-review workshops; reached 150+ attendees across the year.
Coordinated mentorship matching for 30 undergraduates.
Tutored high school students weekly in Python basics and problem-solving.

metadata.notes: Master resume intentionally includes exhaustive content for downstream ranking/selection into tailored resumes.
